results.title: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan’s first Cannes 2026 look breaks internet
results.description: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan, who has been away from the silver screen for quite some time, was spotted jetting off to the ongoing edition of the Cannes Film Festival in the early hours of Friday. The actress received a warm welcome upon arriving at Hotel Martinez in Cannes. Now, Aishwarya is all set to dominate the red carpet yet again, and the first visuals of her appearance have already sent social media into a frenzy.
